summary: UI Polish Testing for HoneyGroove - 4 items tested: Filter dropdown emoji-first layout, Now Spinning SVG icon, Collection buttons mobile layout. All features verified working correctly via code review and desktop Playwright testing.

filter_dropdown_emoji_first.details: Filter dropdown shows emoji FIRST, then text (e.g., '🍯 All', '🎵 Now Spinning'). Verified via Playwright test - button text shows '🍯 All' format.

filter_dropdown_dividers.details: Dividers present between filter options using rgba(218,165,32,0.12) color. Code confirms 6 dividers found (one between each of 7 items). Divider NOT present after last item 'For Sale/Trade' - code uses 'idx < FEED_FILTERS.length - 1' check.

filter_dropdown_checkmark.details: Active filter shows gold checkmark (✓) on far right side using 'ml-auto' CSS. Checkmark color is #DAA520 (gold). Does not interfere with emoji-text layout.

now_spinning_chip_icon.details: Now Spinning composer chip uses Music SVG icon from lucide-react (NOT emoji 🎵). Icon color is #78350F (dark honey), matching other chip icons. Verified via Playwright - SVG found with rgb(120, 53, 15) color.

now_spinning_modal_icon.details: Now Spinning modal title uses Music SVG icon, not emoji. Verified via Playwright test - modal title has SVG element.

collection_buttons_desktop.details: Desktop (1920px): Buttons show full labels 'Select', 'Duplicates', 'Fix Images'. All 3 buttons have uniform height (36px = h-9). Buttons in horizontal row (flex-row). Verified via Playwright.

collection_buttons_mobile.details: Mobile (390px): Code review confirms buttons use 'flex flex-row gap-2' for horizontal layout. Condensed labels implemented: 'Dupes' (sm:hidden), 'Fix' (sm:hidden) show on mobile. Full labels 'Duplicates', 'Fix Images' use 'hidden sm:inline' for desktop only. Button heights consistent at h-9. No overflow - buttons use 'flex-1' to share space.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI polish items verified. Filter dropdown emoji-first layout confirmed with Playwright. Now Spinning SVG icon confirmed. Collection buttons mobile layout confirmed via code review - uses responsive CSS classes (hidden sm:inline / sm:hidden). Mobile Playwright testing had session issues but code confirms correct implementation.
screenshots: .screenshots/04_hive_page.png - Hive page with composer bar showing Now Spinning chip with Music SVG icon
.screenshots/05_filter_dropdown.png - Open filter dropdown showing emoji-first layout with dividers and gold checkmark
.screenshots/06_now_spinning_modal.png - Now Spinning modal with Music SVG icon in title
.screenshots/07_collection_desktop.png - Collection page on desktop with full button labels (Select, Duplicates, Fix Images)
